nation: Conseil de la Première Nation des Innus Essipit
economic_notes: Nation has significant economic activities including crab fishing, retail, community housing, outfitters, excursions, camping, ecotours, wind energy project (Parc éolien Rivière-du-Moulin, 350 MW capacity), hydroelectric participation (rivière Portneuf with Hydro-Québec), and multiple commercial partnerships including Namunashu, Groupe Umek, Société en commandite Apuiat, Granulco, Rénovations J.M.B.R.
notes: Audit is qualified (opinion avec réserve) for multiple reasons: (1) certain public enterprises consolidated by full consolidation instead of modified equity method (Camping Tadoussac, Les Croisières Essipit, Hébergement Essipit, Mer et Monde Écotours); (2) internally developed intangible assets capitalized ($879,825) contrary to PSAS; (3) contribution agreement funds not recognized as liabilities ($3,888,104); (4) dam infrastructure contribution not measured at fair value; (5) asset retirement obligations under SP 3280 not recognized. Fiscal year is March 31, 2023. Nation is located in Quebec. No remuneration schedule found in extracted text. OSR calculated as total revenue minus all government transfers (26,194,911 - 11,095,303 = 15,099,608). Cash includes both non-interest bearing ($3,367,466) and interest-bearing ($7,542,829) accounts totaling $10,910,295.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
